sentence: 她在海边喝了一个新鲜椰子。
pinyin: Tā zài hǎibiān hē le yī gè xīnxiān yēzi.
english: She drank a fresh coconut by the seaside.

sentence: 医生建议妈妈至少哺乳六个月。
pinyin: Yīshēng jiànyì māma zhìshǎo bǔrǔ liù gè yuè.
english: The doctor recommended that the mother breastfeed for at least six months.

sentence: 这款手机的显示屏非常清晰。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn shǒujī de xiǎnshìpíng fēicháng qīngxī.
english: The display screen on this phone is very clear.

sentence: 在太阳下看手机，需要调高亮度。
pinyin: Zài tàiyáng xià kàn shǒujī, xūyào tiáo gāo liàngdù.
english: You need to increase the brightness to use your phone in sunlight.

sentence: 多吃蔬菜有助于保持肠道健康。
pinyin: Duō chī shūcài yǒu zhù yú bǎochí chángdào jiànkāng.
english: Eating more vegetables helps maintain gut health.

sentence: 演唱会现场部署了大量警力维持秩序。
pinyin: Yǎnchànghhuì xiànchǎng bùshǔ le dàliàng jǐnglì wéichí zhìxù.
english: A large police force was deployed at the concert venue to maintain order.

sentence: 他在银行开了一个新的储蓄户头。
pinyin: Tā zài yínháng kāi le yī gè xīn de chǔxù hùtóu.
english: He opened a new savings account at the bank.

meaning: 1. to broadcast a film; 2. to televise
sentence: 这部电影将在周末播映，别错过。
pinyin: Zhè bù diànyǐng jiāng zài zhōumò bōyìng, bié cuòguò.
english: This film will be broadcast this weekend, don't miss it.

sentence: 公司帮所有员工购买了医疗保险。
pinyin: Gōngsī bāng suǒyǒu yuángōng gòumǎi le yīliáo bǎoxiǎn.
english: The company purchased medical insurance for all employees.

sentence: 多国对该地区实施了武器禁运。
pinyin: Duō guó duì gāi dìqū shíshī le wǔqì jìnyùn.
english: Multiple countries imposed an arms embargo on the region.

sentence: 公园里绿水环绕，景色很美。
pinyin: Gōngyuán lǐ lǜshuǐ huánrào, jǐngsè hěn měi.
english: The park is surrounded by clear green water and the scenery is beautiful.

sentence: 那个男童在公园里开心地玩耍。
pinyin: Nàge nántóng zài gōngyuán lǐ kāixīn de wánshuǎ.
english: The little boy was playing happily in the park.

meaning: 1. devils; 2. refers to 日本鬼子, wartime term insult for Japanese
sentence: 奶奶小时候见过鬼子进村的景象。
pinyin: Nǎinai xiǎoshíhòu jiàn guò guǐzi jìn cūn de jǐngxiàng.
english: Grandma witnessed the invaders entering the village when she was a child.

sentence: 他的账号被平台加入了黑名单。
pinyin: Tā de zhànghào bèi píngtái jiārù le hēimíngdān.
english: His account was added to the platform's blacklist.

sentence: 他把奖金全都挥霍在买衣服上了。
pinyin: Tā bǎ jiǎngjīn quán dōu huīhuò zài mǎi yīfu shàng le.
english: He squandered all his bonus money on buying clothes.

sentence: 烹饪用具要定期清洗，保持干净。
pinyin: Pēngrèn yòngjù yào dìngqī qīngxǐ, bǎochí gānjìng.
english: Cooking utensils should be cleaned regularly to stay hygienic.

sentence: 这张桌子是椭圆形的，可以坐很多人。
pinyin: Zhè zhāng zhuōzi shì tuǒyuán xíng de, kěyǐ zuò hěn duō rén.
english: This table is oval-shaped and can seat many people.

sentence: 那位老奶奶每天早上在公园里散步。
pinyin: Nà wèi lǎonǎinai měitiān zǎoshang zài gōngyuán lǐ sànbù.
english: That elderly lady takes a walk in the park every morning.

sentence: 每天吃一小把坚果对身体很好。
pinyin: Měitiān chī yī xiǎo bǎ jiānguǒ duì shēntǐ hěn hǎo.
english: Eating a small handful of nuts every day is good for your health.

sentence: 她的衣着总是很得体，给人好印象。
pinyin: Tā de yīzhuó zǒngshì hěn détǐ, gěi rén hǎo yìnxiàng.
english: Her clothes are always appropriate and make a good impression.

sentence: 天文望远镜拍到了美丽的星云照片。
pinyin: Tiānwén wàngyuǎnjìng pāi dào le měilì de xīngyún zhàopiàn.
english: The telescope captured beautiful photos of a nebula.

sentence: 老师在黑板上画了一个三角形。
pinyin: Lǎoshī zài hēibǎn shàng huà le yī gè sānjiǎoxíng.
english: The teacher drew a triangle on the blackboard.

sentence: 村里的戏台每逢过节都会有演出。
pinyin: Cūn lǐ de xìtái měi féng guòjié dōu huì yǒu yǎnchū.
english: The village stage has performances every time there's a festival.

meaning: 1. to wriggle; 2. snaking; 3. winding; 4. to zigzag; 5. to meander
sentence: 一条小河蜿蜒流过这片田野。
pinyin: Yī tiáo xiǎohé wānyán liú guò zhè piàn tiányě.
english: A small river winds its way through the fields.

sentence: 新闻媒体对这件事进行了广泛报道。
pinyin: Xīnwén méitǐ duì zhè jiàn shì jìnxíng le guǎngfàn bàodào.
english: The news media gave extensive coverage to this event.

sentence: 在屏幕上向左滑动可以切换图片。
pinyin: Zài píngmù shàng xiàng zuǒ huádòng kěyǐ qiēhuàn túpiàn.
english: Slide left on the screen to switch to the next photo.

sentence: 她退休后迷上了园艺。
pinyin: Tā tuìxiū hòu míshàngle yuányì.
english: After retiring, she became obsessed with gardening.

meaning: 1. smallpox; 2. ceiling; 3. stamen of corn; 4. (old) snow; 5. (dialect
sentence: 天花已经在全球被消灭了。
pinyin: Tiānhuā yǐjīng zài quánqiú bèi xiāomiè le.
english: Smallpox has already been eradicated worldwide.

sentence: 博物馆里有很多史前动物的化石。
pinyin: Bówùguǎn lǐ yǒu hěn duō shǐqián dòngwù de huàshí.
english: The museum has many fossils of prehistoric animals.

sentence: 犀牛是濒危动物，需要保护。
pinyin: Xīniú shì bīnwēi dòngwù, xūyào bǎohù.
english: Rhinoceroses are endangered animals that need protection.

sentence: 他被判了五年刑期。
pinyin: Tā bèi pànle wǔ nián xíngqī.
english: He was sentenced to a five-year prison term.

sentence: 节假日商场里涌来大批人潮。
pinyin: Jiéjiàrì shāngchǎng lǐ yǒng lái dàpī réncháo.
english: On holidays, a massive tide of people floods into the shopping mall.

sentence: 这件陶器是汉代出土的文物。
pinyin: Zhè jiàn táoqì shì Hàndài chūtǔ de wénwù.
english: This piece of pottery is a cultural relic unearthed from the Han dynasty.

sentence: 人生无常，要珍惜眼前的人。
pinyin: Rénshēng wúcháng, yào zhēnxī yǎnqián de rén.
english: Life is impermanent, so cherish the people around you.

sentence: 他快步走进会议室，落座后马上开始发言。
pinyin: Tā kuàibù zǒu jìn huìyìshì, luòzuò hòu mǎshàng kāishǐ fāyán.
english: He strode quickly into the meeting room and started speaking as soon as he sat down.

sentence: 这种寄生虫会通过食物传染给人类。
pinyin: Zhè zhǒng jìshēngchóng huì tōngguò shíwù chuánrǎn gěi rénlèi.
english: This type of parasite can be transmitted to humans through food.

meaning: 1. on the same level; 2. ranking equally
sentence: 我们是同级同学，关系一直很好。
pinyin: Wǒmen shì tóngjí tóngxué, guānxi yīzhí hěn hǎo.
english: We are classmates in the same grade and have always gotten along well.

sentence: 孩子最喜欢坐双层巴士的上层。
pinyin: Háizi zuì xǐhuān zuò shuāngcéng bāshì de shàngcéng.
english: Kids love sitting on the upper deck of the double-decker bus.

sentence: 这座山海拔三千米高于海平面。
pinyin: Zhè zuò shān hǎibá sānqiān mǐ gāoyú hǎipíngmiàn.
english: This mountain rises three thousand meters above sea level.

sentence: 他穿着一件褐色的皮夹克。
pinyin: Tā chuānzhe yī jiàn hèsè de pí jiākè.
english: He was wearing a brown leather jacket.

sentence: 快递盒子破损了，里面的东西也坏了。
pinyin: Kuàidì hézi pòsǔn le, lǐmiàn de dōngxi yě huài le.
english: The delivery box was damaged, and the contents were ruined too.

meaning: 1. Thank heavens!; 2. Thank goodness that's worked out so well!
sentence: 谢天谢地，钱包找到了！
pinyin: Xiè tiān xiè dì, qiánbāo zhǎodào le!
english: Thank goodness, the wallet was found!

sentence: 风把院子里的花盆推倒了。
pinyin: Fēng bǎ yuànzi lǐ de huāpén tuīdǎo le.
english: The wind knocked over the flower pots in the courtyard.

sentence: 这家诊所的诊疗费用比较实惠。
pinyin: Zhè jiā zhěnsuǒ de zhěnliáo fèiyòng bǐjiào shíhuì.
english: The diagnosis and treatment fees at this clinic are quite affordable.

meaning: 1. distant seas; 2. the open ocean (far from the coast)
sentence: 他在远洋货轮上工作了十年。
pinyin: Tā zài yuǎnyáng huòlún shàng gōngzuòle shí nián.
english: He worked on an ocean-going freighter for ten years.

meaning: 1. achievement; 2. meritorious deed; 3. contributions (for the good of
sentence: 老将军为国家立下了卓越的功勋。
pinyin: Lǎo jiāngjūn wèi guójiā lì xià le zhuóyuè de gōngxūn.
english: The old general rendered outstanding meritorious service to the country.

sentence: 这款充电器输出的是直流电。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn chōngdiànqì shūchū de shì zhíliú diàn.
english: This charger outputs direct current (DC).

sentence: 汉字是一种表意文字系统。
pinyin: Hànzì shì yī zhǒng biǎoyì wénzì xìtǒng.
english: Chinese characters are a type of ideographic writing system.

sentence: 他骂那个骗子是个王八蛋。
pinyin: Tā mà nàge piànzi shì gè wángbādàn.
english: He cursed that scammer as a bastard.

sentence: 邻居家的狗跳过栅栏跑进来了。
pinyin: Línjū jiā de gǒu tiàoguò zhàlan pǎo jìnlái le.
english: The neighbor's dog jumped over the fence and ran in.
